one_time_description: Unrealized gain on investment (Zenabis Global Inc. shares); prior year had unrealized loss of $8,251,314
economic_notes: First Nation operates commercial fisheries, forestry, and economic development programs. Investment in E.Gagnon & Fils (crab fishery return arrangement). Investment in Zenabis Global Inc. (cannabis company). Land settlement trust fund of $17.2M for band members. Mi'gmaweiMawiomi Business Corporation joint arrangement. On June 1, 2021, Hexo Corp. acquired Zenabis, resulting in 45,620 HEXO shares for LMG.
notes: Province is Quebec (Listuguj reserve). Two consolidated subsidiaries: Listuguj Mi'gmaq Government Land Acquisition Corporation and Listuguj Mi'gmaq Development Center. One GBE: Mi'gmaweiMawiomi Business Corporation (joint arrangement at cost). Land Settlement Trust Fund of $17.23M is included in both financial assets and liabilities (net zero), representing trust funds held for band members. Prior year comparatives restated due to ISC and Health Canada review adjustments. Restricted cash includes Land Settlement Trust Fund ($17,230,534), Replacement Reserve Fund ($791,340), and Operating Reserve Fund ($483,513). Unrealized loss of $8,251,314 on investments in prior year was a major non-recurring item. Schedule of remuneration present in document but values not extracted from text provided. OSR calculated as total revenue $77,060,179 minus total government transfers $48,255,968 = $28,804,211.
